nodes.label: AI as collaborative decision-making partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or error-prone tool
nodes.grounding_span: the collaboration between me and the chatbot can lead to better and more confident decisions on my end

nodes.label: AI as expertise complement for unfamiliar domains
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary crutch for familiar domains
nodes.grounding_span: stuff such as health topics, or in-depth financial claims are not my expertise. So I am more likely to collab with the chatbot

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: when I occasionally see an error in the chatbots response that I believe shouldn't exist. Such as common sense or basic facts

nodes.label: AI as time-saving efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: It saves me time on research, but also cuts out the middle man

nodes.label: Human irreplaceability in understanding human complexity
nodes.label_negative: AI potential to replace human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: it takes a human to understand a human. Until that isn't true, I don't worry about it

nodes.label: Confidence in decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: better and more confident decisions on my end

nodes.label: Human autonomy and irreplaceability
nodes.grounding_span: it takes a human to understand a human

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI collaboration for broader perspectives
nodes.grounding_span: the chatbot includes perspectives that I didn't originally think of

nodes.label: Frustration with AI basic factual errors
nodes.grounding_span: when I occasionally see an error in the chatbots response that I believe shouldn't exist

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability
nodes.grounding_span: it takes a human to understand a human. Until that isn't true, I don't worry about it

nodes.label: Domain-dependent collaboration — leverages AI selectively based on expertise
nodes.grounding_span: stuff such as health topics, or in-depth financial claims are not my expertise. So I am more likely to collab with the chatbot

nodes.label: Independent verification tendency — cross-checks AI outputs against own knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: If I feel confident enough, I will make the decision independently
